abilities.name: Diving Charge
abilities.text: This model's Charge action may be declared while engaged.

abilities.name: Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

actions.name: Blackened Teeth
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is within 1" of a Rift marker, this action receives a (c).

triggers.name: Shared Purpose
triggers.text: An ally leader may declare an attack action targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Shove Aside
triggers.text: Once per activation. Move the target 4". Then, this model moves up to 4" and may declare a (melee) action targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Shattered Rift
triggers.text: This model may remove a Rift marker within 1" of the target. If it does so, deal 1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Caught by Surprise
triggers.text: An enemy model within 2" gains a Slow token.

actions.name: Hunting Song
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp toward this model. Then, make a Rift marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Focused Cleansing
triggers.text: This model heals 2 and may remove a token from itself.

triggers.name: Horrifying Display
triggers.text: When resolving, the target is moved away from this model instead of toward it.
